package rulecoverage

func NegativeReadThenDecodeDuplicateMaterialization() string {
    ruleID := "read_then_decode_duplicate_materialization"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "io.ReadAll(...) materializes a payload and the same binding is then unmarshaled again instead of using a streaming decode path."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
